name: Code Review Sync
description: Stay on top of code reviews by checking pending reviews, viewing PR diffs, and submitting review feedback from the CLI.

steps.title: Check your review status across repos
steps.description: See all PRs where your review is requested.
steps.tip: This shows PRs you created, PRs requesting your review, and PRs on your current branch.

steps.title: View the diff of a PR
steps.description: See the code changes in a pull request.

steps.title: Submit a review with comments
steps.description: Approve, request changes, or comment on a PR.
steps.command: gh pr review 42 --comment --body 'Looks good overall. One suggestion on the error handling in auth.ts.'

steps.title: View review comments on a PR
steps.description: Read all review comments and conversations.

fullScript:
#!/bin/bash
# Code Review Sync
set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Your PR Status ==="
gh pr status

echo ""
echo "=== Review Commands ==="
echo "Diff:     gh pr diff <number>"
echo "Approve:  gh pr review <number> --approve"
echo "Changes:  gh pr review <number> --request-changes --body 'reason'"
echo "Comment:  gh pr review <number> --comment --body 'feedback'"
echo "View:     gh pr view <number> --comments"

faq.question: How do I review PRs across multiple repositories?
faq.answer: Use GitHub's notification settings or 'gh search prs --review-requested=@me --state=open' to find all PRs awaiting your review.

faq.question: Can I add line-specific comments from the CLI?
faq.answer: Not directly with gh pr review. For line comments, use the GitHub web interface or the API via 'gh api'.
